title: Extra Compat
description: Expands and better connects the modded experience by adding compat and connecting mods
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88bc83647d6658feaac7a2c7274dfd11dec220fe.png)

________________________________________________________________________________________________

Extra Compat better connects and fixes many popular mods through adding missing content, many items to tags, filling in gaps, fixing naming errors, adding missing entries to java classes and so much more!

Full list of mods on the READ_ME: https://github.com/CyberRat7/Extra_Compat

________________________________________________________________________________________________

**FAQ:**

**Will there be a fabric version:**

No there will not

**Will you add more mods:**

Yes, i will overtime update this mod and add more compat, if you have any suggestions leave them in the comments

**Will you update to 1.20.2+:**

Currently this mod will be staying on 1.20.1 

**Can i use this in my modpacks:**

Yes feel free to use this in any curseforge modpack
